reviews.raw_body:
On Wed, Mar 18, 2026 at 03:53:22PM -0400, Johannes Weiner wrote:
> The MEMCG and !MEMCG paths have the same pattern. Share the code.
> 
> Reviewed-by: David Hildenbrand (Arm) <david@kernel.org>
> Signed-off-by: Johannes Weiner <hannes@cmpxchg.org>

Acked-by: Shakeel Butt <shakeel.butt@linux.dev>

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Reviewed the patch without raising any concerns or suggestions.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: The patch deduplicates the lock_list_lru() function by sharing a common implementation between MEMCG and non-MEMCG paths, reducing code duplication.
